---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/bauke-brenninkmeijer-40143310b/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/Baukebrenninkmeijer
---

## Hi there, I'm Bauke

I'm a Research Engineer at [orq.ai](https://orq.ai), where I work on AI agent infrastructure, LLM evaluation, and production AI systems. Day to day, that means running experiments on model fine-tuning and prompt optimization to squeeze more out of smaller models, building observability tooling for AI agents, and researching how design choices like prompt structure actually affect LLM-as-a-judge reliability across models. I write about this work on the [orq.ai research blog](https://orq.ai/research).

Before orq.ai, I spent several years as a data scientist and AI engineer in Dutch banking (ABN AMRO, ING), building everything from real-time streaming frameworks to RAG-based document processing pipelines.

I have a background in computer science and data science (MSc, Radboud University), with a thesis on synthetic tabular data generation using GANs. That work led to [table-evaluator](https://github.com/baukebrenninkmeijer/table-evaluator), an open-source library for evaluating synthetic data quality that's used across finance, healthcare, and government.

Outside of work, I co-organize the [MLOps Community Amsterdam](https://mlops.community/) chapter and speak at conferences about applied AI and getting models into production.

## Projects

### table-evaluator

An open-source Python library for evaluating how well synthetic datasets match real data. Born from my master's thesis work on GANs for tabular data, it's grown to 90+ stars and is available on [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/table-evaluator/).

<a class="github-button" href="https://github.com/baukebrenninkmeijer/table-evaluator" data-icon="octicon-star" data-show-count="true" aria-label="Star baukebrenninkmeijer/table-evaluator on GitHub">Star</a>
<script async defer src="https://buttons.github.io/buttons.js"></script>

### Master Thesis

In my thesis, I researched improvements to Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) for tabular data. At the time, GANs for tabular data were still very early work. Apart from two improvements to the GAN architecture, I also wrote table-evaluator as an open-source evaluation framework.

- [Thesis repo](https://github.com/baukebrenninkmeijer/On-the-Generation-and-Evaluation-of-Synthetic-Tabular-Data-using-GANs)
- [Thesis PDF](https://www.cs.ru.nl/masters-theses/2019/B_Brenninkmeijer___On_the_generation_and_evaluation_of_tabular_data_using_GANs.pdf)
